case_title: RUTH LIPMAN VS. EMMALANI RAMOS et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIPMAN, RUTH TRUSTEE OF LIPMAN FAMILY TRUST ON DEFENDANT RAMOS, EMMALANI
